purpose: Rung-0 machine-readable deferred-ontology-expansion backlog. Read by .agents/hooks/check_ontology_expansion.py (rung 1), which nudges at session start when a trigger artifact has landed on disk while the owed card(s) are still missing. Pointers only -- the adopted deliverable is the authority for what each type is and why it is deferred. Not doctrine, validation, or readiness.

deferred_no_auto_trigger.basis: RESERVED (§2.2 row 17, §6.1): graduates by dated owner amendment when a real Org-object backing lands. Org-motion / EDGAR headcount data corroborates (G4) but is NOT an Org-object definition, so it does not auto-trigger a card.
RESERVED (§2.2 row 16, §6.1): graduates by dated owner amendment when a landed backing artifact appears.
Backing = buyer-proof packet (§2.2 row 11). Card when a real Memo instance is produced; no concrete artifact path to watch yet.
No single backing artifact yet (§2.2 row 3, §3). Card when a Product backing lands.
No card-set asset yet (§2.2 row 5, §3); a future asset parallel to the venue cards.
Backing exists (orca-harness/source_capture/models.py, §2.2 row 14). Available now; deferred for consumer pull, not a trigger to wait on.
Backing = IPF foundation + evidence ladder (§2.2 row 15). Available on pull, not a trigger to wait on.

Backing = CapturePacket / scan-spec forward (§2.2 row 7, §3). Owner-deferred 2026-06-18: the demand-scan-core spec is PROPOSED and authorizes no scan run, so no real captured Observation instance exists yet (the candidate pool is a candidate table, not observation instances). Card on the first scan-emitted Observation; no concrete emission artifact to watch yet. Re-expressing the §3 schema alone would duplicate §2.2/§3 (cards are instances, pointer-not-restate).

Backing = demand-read taxonomy (§2.2 row 8): a grammar, not instances; resolved pool cases are brand-decision events with null trend_vector. Owner-deferred 2026-06-18: card when a real TrendVector instance is emitted by a scan; no concrete artifact path to watch yet.

Backing = scan-spec §6 wind-caller call record (forward) / read outputs (§2.2 row 6). Owner-deferred 2026-06-18: no worked wind-caller Call instance in the current case set (INCIDecoder is named as the future exemplar; scan unrun). Card when a real Call lands.
Backing = read outputs, an explicit gap (§2.2 row 10). Owner-deferred 2026-06-18: no Read-action output exists yet. Card when a real Reading is emitted.
